engineering.subject: Candidate Submission: {{candidate_name}} — {{role}} | The Jobs Jungle
engineering.body:
Dear {{client_contact}},

I hope this message finds you well.

I am pleased to submit {{candidate_name}} for the {{role}} position at {{client_name}}. Having reviewed their profile thoroughly, I believe they present a strong match for the technical and cultural requirements of this role.

Please find attached their CV for your review. {{debrief_section}}

We would be happy to arrange a technical interview at your earliest convenience. Please let us know your preferred timeline and any specific areas you would like explored further.

Best regards,
The Jobs Jungle Team
contact@thejobsjungle.com
